metadata.siteDescription: Discover and share Fujifilm film simulation recipes

auth.signInDescription: Sign in to upload, bookmark, and like recipes

recommend.title: AI Recipe Recommendation
recommend.description: Upload a photo and discover similar film recipes instantly.

benefits.match: Find recipes that match any photo's look

bookmarks.title: Bookmark Recipes
bookmarks.description: Save your favorite recipes and access them anytime.

likes.description: Show appreciation for recipes you love.

benefits.track: Keep track of recipes you enjoyed

upload.title: Upload Your Recipe
upload.description: Share your Fujifilm film recipes with the community.

benefits.share: Share your unique film simulation settings
benefits.feedback: Get likes and feedback from others

recommend.title: Recipe Recommendations
recommend.subtitle: Upload a photo or describe the look you want to find matching recipes
recommend.imageSearchDescription: Upload any photo and AI will find recipes with a similar look and color tone.
recommend.textSearchDescription: Describe the look you want, like "warm sunset portrait" or "moody street at night".
recommend.cameraFilterDescription: Narrow results to your camera model for compatible recipe settings.
recommend.uploadPhoto: Upload any photo to find matching Fujifilm recipes
recommend.textPlaceholder: e.g. warm sunset portrait, moody street at night, vintage film look...
recommend.textHint: Describe the look you want and we'll find matching recipes
recommend.noResults: No similar recipes found. Try uploading a different photo or changing your search text.
recommend.noResultsHistory: No results found for this recommendation.
recommend.authDescription: Sign in to get personalized recipe recommendations from your photos.
recommend.historyAuthDescription: Sign in to view your past recipe recommendations.
